title: Brett Kearney
extract: Brett Kearney (born 29 September 1983 in Sydney, New South Wales), also known by his  initials "BK", is an Australian professional rugby league footballer formerly with the Bradford Bulls in the Super League, now currently playing for the Collegians in the Illawarra Rugby League competition. A utility back, he has represented Country Origin and previously played for the South Sydney Rabbitohs and Cronulla.
